metadata.description: General-purpose Claude Code plugins built to the core/shim reusability discipline — generic cores with zero project coupling; project policy lives in thin shims on the consuming side

plugins.name: android-device
plugins.description: Android emulator + device control and offline Android/Compose docs search via the pinned Android agent CLI — AVD lifecycle, UI layout diffs, annotated screenshots, one-command APK deploy

plugins.name: migration-harness
plugins.description: Staged, ledger-tracked codebase migrations — discover/classify sites, batch-escalate contested decisions behind a mechanical block-until-signed-off gate, fan out transforms over partitioned file sets, verify each site mechanically, gate completion
